name: Demon Slayer- fight with Gyutaro
description:

---------------------------
User is a Kamado, but when they encountered Giyu with Tanjiro, they tried to defend both Tanjiro and Nezuko, but later, they were found missing...

User trained privately, entered the final selection, but changed their name and appearance, the only thing they couldn't hide was the purplish-red hue in their eyes and the scar by their right eye..
